reviews.author: Manya Deshmukh
reviews.body: delivery bhi time pr mili hai or product bhi same phtot jaise mila hai boht acha hai product mujhe boht psand aaya

reviews.author: Devit Kaushik
reviews.body: Bracelet fashionable bhi hai aur colorful design ki wajah se kaafi special bhi lagta hai. Har outfit ke saath easily match ho jata hai.

reviews.author: Hridansh Pillai
reviews.body: Bracelet ka material strong lagta hai aur chain ka shine bhi bahut elegant hai. Overall quality expectations se better lagi.

reviews.author: Kiara Purohit
reviews.body: kafi colourful sa lgg rha hai ye bracelet mujhe boht psand aaya

sections.heading: Key Highlights
sections.text:
• Seven Chakra AlignmentEach bead represents one of the seven chakras — Crown, Third Eye, Throat, Heart, Solar Plexus, Sacral, and Root — supporting energetic balance and inner harmony.

• Colour-Coded Energy FlowThe bead sequence flows through different chakra colours, symbolising balance from higher consciousness to grounding energy.

• 24K Gold Plated Rice ChainPaired with a sleek Rice Chain, the bracelet gets a smooth, premium, and polished golden finish that feels stylish and luxurious.

• Secure Lobster Lock ClosureDesigned with a lobster lock at the back for easy wearing, better grip, and a neat jewellery finish.

• Aesthetic Everyday JewelleryPerfect for daily wear, meditation, office styling, festive looks, spiritual layering, or gifting. It blends crystal energy with modern jewellery appeal.

The bracelet is designed for those who want to carry balance, beauty, and positive intention with them every day.

Disclaimer: Crystals serve as supportive tools for positive intention and mindful living. Personal hard work, conscious action, and practical decision-making remain essential.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 Crafted With
 
 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 • 7 Chakra Crystal Beads - Represent the seven energy centres and support alignment, inner balance, positivity, and spiritual harmony.

• 24K Gold Plated Rice Chain - Smooth, sleek chain that gives the bracelet a premium golden shine and polished look.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 Benefits
 
 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 • 7 Chakra Alignment

Represents all seven chakras to support balance, harmony, and positive energy flow.

• Inner Balance

Helps carry an intention of emotional balance, calmness, clarity, and grounding.

• Positive Energy Support

A meaningful crystal jewellery piece for daily positivity, spiritual focus, and mindful living.

• Rice Chain Styling

The Rice Chain adds a clean, premium, and stylish look to the bracelet.

• Secure Lobster Lock

The lobster lock gives the bracelet a comfortable, easy-to-wear, and secure wrist fit.

• Aesthetic Everyday Jewellery

Easy to style with casual outfits, office looks, festive wear, kurtas, shirts, and layered bracelet combinations.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 Product Specification
 
 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 • Net Quantity: 1 Bracelet.

• Bracelet Type: 7 Chakra Rice Chain Bracelet.

• Chain Type: Rice Chain.

• Lock Type: Lobster Lock Closure.

• Chain Finish: 24K Gold Plated.

• Crystal Used: 7 Chakra Crystal Beads.

• Wear Feel: Lightweight and comfortable.

• Style: Spiritual crystal jewellery for daily wear, gifting, and layering.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 More Information
 
 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 Marketed By:

Nature Touch Nutrition

SECOND FLOOR, 241, LINK ROAD, STREET NO.3,

Dashmesh Nagar, Ludhiana, Ludhiana, Punjab, 141003.

 

 

 
 
 

 
 FAQ
 
 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 Q1. What is the 7 Chakra Rice Chain Bracelet used for?

It is used as a crystal energy jewellery piece for balance, positivity, clarity, grounding, and spiritual alignment.

Q2. Which chakras are represented in this bracelet?

The bracelet represents all seven chakras — Crown, Third Eye, Throat, Heart, Solar Plexus, Sacral, and Root Chakra.

Q3. Can I wear this bracelet daily?

Yes, you can wear it daily during work, travel, meditation, spiritual practice, or regular styling.

Q4. What is the benefit of the Rice Chain?

The Rice Chain gives the bracelet a premium, textured, stylish, and modern jewellery look.

Q5. What is the benefit of the lobster lock?

The lobster lock helps secure the bracelet properly on the wrist and gives it a neat, comfortable, and easy-to-wear finish.

Q6. Is this bracelet good for gifting?

Yes, it makes a meaningful gift for someone who loves crystals, spiritual jewellery, positive energy, and aesthetic accessories.

Q7. How should I care for this bracelet?

Avoid water, perfume, sweat, and harsh chemicals. Wipe gently with a soft dry cloth and store separately in a pouch or jewellery box.

Q8. Are natural crystals exactly the same in every piece?
